key_models.purchase.order: Purchase Order / RFQ. Fields: partner_id, date_order, order_line, state, invoice_status, picking_count, amount_total.
key_models.purchase.order.line: PO line. Fields: product_id, product_qty, price_unit, price_subtotal, taxes_id, date_planned, order_id.
key_models.res.partner: Vendor/supplier. Fields: supplier_rank, property_purchase_currency_id, property_account_payable_id, purchase_warn.
key_models.product.supplierinfo: Vendor-specific product info. Fields: partner_id, product_id, product_tmpl_id, min_qty, price, currency_id, delay.
key_models.purchase.requisition: Purchase agreement / blanket order. Fields: name, vendor_id, type (blanket/tender), line_ids, state.
key_models.purchase.requisition.line: Agreement line. Fields: product_id, product_qty, price_unit, requisition_id.
key_models.stock.picking: Incoming shipment. Fields: purchase_id, move_ids, state, date_done.
key_models.account.move: Vendor bill. Fields: invoice_origin, purchase_id, line_ids, amount_total.
key_models.stock.landed.cost: Landed cost allocation. Fields: picking_ids, cost_lines, valuation_adjustment_lines, state, account_journal_id.
key_models.stock.warehouse.orderpoint: Reordering rule. Fields: product_id, location_id, product_min_qty, product_max_qty, qty_multiple.

key_files.purchase/models/account_move.py: Vendor bill integration and three-way matching

crons.purchase_send_reminder: Vendor reminder emails. Model: purchase.order, method: send_reminder
crons.procurement_scheduler: Procurement scheduler. Model: procurement.group, method: run_scheduler

security_groups.purchase.group_purchase_user: Create and manage own RFQs/POs and read products/vendors
security_groups.purchase.group_purchase_manager: Full configuration of POs, vendors, pricelists, and purchase settings
security_groups.purchase.group_warning_purchase: View purchase warnings on products and vendors
